title: Minecon Ruins
description: An archaeology mod about a relic from Minecraft's past. Explore the ruins of Minecon and find its sought-after capes
body:
# Minecon Ruins

[![](https://i.imgur.com/UoIBayo.png)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

An archaeology mod about a relic from Minecraft's past. Explore the ruins of Minecon and find its sought-after capes.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iaFRY0rC/images/b7197f39dda6b108129e00c2775a4f8898642d5a.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iaFRY0rC/images/e456e94b550fa48f78c8bf31e3ed6aa1498d2500.png)
